message:
feat(web): render per-agent stats in sidebar agent tree

Add per-agent stats display to each tree node showing:
- Current state (Calling LLM / Executing tool / Delegating)
- Turn number (T1, T2, etc.)
- Token counts (input/output)

Stats are derived from LLM events via useAgentStats hook and passed
through Sidebar -> AgentTree -> TreeNode. Stats line is only shown
for agents with meaningful activity (not idle with zero tokens).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
